sections.html:
Trinidad and Tobago Construction Partner

Building Strong Foundations. Delivering Reliable Solutions.

M.J.CO Limited provides professional general construction, civil works, maintenance, fabrication, roofing, renovation, and project support services across Trinidad and Tobago.

From foundation to finish, we deliver dependable solutions for homes, businesses, warehouses, factories, and industrial facilities with strong focus on safety, quality, and cost control.

Request a QuoteView Our ServicesSee Our ProjectsContact M.J.CO Limited

Trusted. Practical. Professional.

Quality work, safe execution, and reliable results for residential, commercial, and industrial clients.

Construction General building from groundwork to finishing.
Maintenance Planned and emergency maintenance support.
Civil Works Drains, beams, slabs, ramps, trenching.
Fabrication Steel solutions, gates, stairs, and platforms.

sections.label: Why Choose Us
sections.html:
Why Choose M.J.CO Limited

Proven Capability

  • Experienced in residential, commercial, and industrial construction.
  • Capable of working in live industrial and commercial environments.
  • Reliable project supervision and hands-on management.

Technical Breadth

  • Skilled in civil works, renovations, roofing, welding, plumbing, and maintenance.
  • Professional quotations, BOQs, method statements, JSAs, and risk assessments.
  • Strong focus on safety, housekeeping, and client operations.

Value and Reliability

  • Competitive pricing without compromising quality.
  • Clear communication and practical, durable outcomes.
  • Long-term client support from first visit to project closeout.

sections.label: About Intro
sections.html:
About M.J.CO Limited

Built on Reliability, Quality Workmanship, and Long-Term Relationships

M.J.CO Limited is a Trinidad and Tobago based construction and maintenance company committed to delivering strong, practical, and cost-effective solutions. We believe in doing work properly, safely, and professionally.

sections.label: Who We Are and How We Work
sections.html:
Who We Are

Our team combines skilled workmanship with practical field experience across homes, commercial spaces, warehouses, and industrial facilities.

We take pride in helping clients complete projects that are safe, durable, clean, and built to last.

How We Work

  • Clear site visits, scope review, and practical recommendations.
  • Professional quotation support including BOQs where required.
  • Hands-on supervision, schedule management, and safe execution.
  • Strong closeout standards with quality checks and housekeeping.

sections.label: Services Intro
sections.html:
Our Services

Construction and Maintenance Services You Can Trust

M.J.CO Limited handles complete construction, civil, maintenance, and fabrication scopes with practical planning and reliable execution.

sections.label: Service List
sections.html:
General Construction

Complete construction from groundwork to finishing, including foundations, columns, beams, slabs, block work, plastering, painting, flooring, and general building works.

Civil Works

Concrete works, drains, box drains, ground beams, slabs, ramps, trenching, excavation, repairs, and structural upgrades.

Renovation & Remodeling

Office renovations, warehouse upgrades, partitions, ceilings, flooring, doors, windows, painting, and complete space transformation.

Roofing & Structural Repairs

Roof repairs, roof installation, purlin replacement, flashing, guttering, leak repairs, shed repairs, and roof support works.

Welding & Fabrication

Gates, steel doors, platforms, staircases, handrails, steel frames, mezzanine structures, security works, and custom metal solutions.

Property Maintenance

Planned and emergency maintenance services for commercial, residential, and industrial properties to keep facilities safe and functional.

Plumbing & Drainage

Plumbing repairs, water line rerouting, drainage solutions, backflow support, pipe installations, and related civil repairs.

HSE & Project Support

Job safety analyses, risk assessments, method statements, work planning, and safe execution procedures for commercial and industrial projects.

Industrial Civil Upgrades

Custom Steel Fabrication

Residential Structural Repairs

Facility Maintenance Program

Scheduled and emergency maintenance support for commercial and industrial clients.

sections.label: Safety Intro
sections.html:
Safety and Quality

Safe Execution and Quality Work Are Core to Every Job

M.J.CO Limited places strong emphasis on site safety, operational awareness, quality standards, and disciplined housekeeping, especially in active commercial and industrial environments.

sections.label: HSE and Quality Details
sections.html:
HSE Support

  • Job Safety Analysis (JSA) support for task-specific hazards.
  • Risk assessments to identify and manage critical exposure.
  • Method statements for planned and controlled execution.
  • Clear work planning for coordination with client operations.

Quality Delivery

  • Practical construction methods tailored to each site.
  • Close supervision and workmanship checks throughout execution.
  • Durable materials and fit-for-purpose construction details.
  • Clean, organized handover standards at completion.
